// ============================================================================
// TEMPLATE: BGL Algorithm Documentation Page
// ============================================================================
//
// Copy, rename to function name, place in pages/algorithms/.
// Delete all // comment lines when done.
//
// ---- SIGNATURE FORMATTING ----
//
//   template <typename A, typename B, typename C,
//             typename D, typename E>
//   ReturnType function_name(
//       const Graph& g,
//       WeightMap weight, DistanceMap distance);
//
//   - Align template continuations under first param
//   - Return type + name on one line, opening ( at end
//   - Function params: 4-space indent, 1-2 per line, ~80 cols
//
// ---- GUIDELINES ----
//
//   - One overload = one signature block + one parameter table
//   - Put named-param overload LAST (it will be deprecated)
//   - If only a named-param version exists, it's just (1)
//   - Complexity goes in the header block (after Defined in, before ---)
//   - All sections below "Description" are optional — skip if N/A
//   - For pages with multiple related functions (e.g., foo + bar),
//     repeat the signature+table pattern under separate === headings
//
// ---- PSEUDO-CODE WITH EVENT POINTS ----
//
//   Use two ---- code blocks in a [cols="1a,1a"] table.
//   Use "." on blank lines to prevent line collapsing.
//   Both columns MUST have the same number of lines.
//
//   [cols="1a,1a"]
//   |===
//   |
//   ----
//   ALGO(G, s)
//     for each vertex u in V
//       d[u] := infinity
//     end for
//   ----
//   |
//   ----
//   .
//   initialize vertex u
//   .
//   .
//   ----
//   |===
//
// ============================================================================
